title: Families First Partnership Programme Transformation (Revenue) Grant Determination 2025 to 2026
body: "This is the grant determination for the Families First Partnership Programme Transformation (Revenue) grant for 2025 to 2026. This is a one-off grant, ringfenced for direct investment in additional transformation activity to support local areas to implement the Family Help, multi-agency child protection and family group decision making reforms through the Families First Partnership programme. This grant should be used alongside the Children’s Social Care Prevention Grant, and the Children and Families Grant, both ringfenced for children’s social care prevention investment. "

taxons.title: Safeguarding and social care for children
